# Electron Stagewright

> MCP server for driving, inspecting, and asserting on real Electron apps. Agent-native by
> design: numbered snapshot refs instead of CSS guessing, a family of single-call expect
> assertions, structured error envelopes with stable codes and recovery hints.

## Docs

- [Tool reference](TOOL-REFERENCE.md): every tool with parameters, return shapes, and error codes — generated from the live manifest
- [Getting started](docs/guides/getting-started.md): install, connect an MCP host, drive the bundled example end to end
- [Connect your MCP client](docs/guides/connect-your-mcp-client.md): wire the published package into Claude Desktop, Cursor, or any MCP host (npx/global/local command forms), verify it connected, troubleshoot stdio/config failures
- [Launch, attach, or inject](docs/guides/launch-or-attach.md): the three ways to get a session against an app
- [Assert UI state](docs/guides/assert-ui-state.md): refs, the expect family, waits, snapshot diffs
- [Type into code editors](docs/guides/type-into-code-editors.md): the reliable Monaco/EditContext/CodeMirror typing path (electron_type_into_editor), replace and clear, the auto-pairing caveat, attached-not-visible waits, and verifying the text landed
- [Capture diagnostics](docs/guides/capture-diagnostics.md): screenshots, console logs, dialogs, session traces
- [Migrate from electron-driver](docs/guides/migrate-from-electron-driver.md): tool-by-tool mapping
- [Concepts](docs/guides/concepts.md): the agent-native model and why -- envelope, refs, snapshots, retrying assertions, sessions/transports, eval and plugins -- each linked to its ADR
- [Security model](docs/guides/security-model.md): trust boundaries, the controls behind --allow-eval, residual risks, and a deployment checklist
- [Architecture decisions](docs/adr/README.md): the design record (ADR-001 through ADR-015)

## Optional

- [Example app and scripted session](examples/minimal-app/README.md): the runnable hello world
- [Contributing](.github/CONTRIBUTING.md): conventions and the public-repo content policy
- [Governance](.github/GOVERNANCE.md): roles, decision-making, and the co-maintainer path
